examples.en: My dog loves to play in the park.
examples.zh: 我的狗喜歡在公園裡玩。

examples.en: That dog is so friendly!
examples.zh: 那隻狗好友善！

examples.en: The cat is sleeping on the sofa.
examples.zh: 貓正睡在沙發上。

examples.en: Do you have a cat at home?
examples.zh: 你家裡有養貓嗎？

examples.en: A bird is singing outside my window.
examples.zh: 一隻鳥在我窗外唱歌。

examples.en: Birds can fly high in the sky.
examples.zh: 鳥能在天空高高飛翔。

examples.en: We keep goldfish in a small tank.
examples.zh: 我們在小魚缸裡養金魚。

examples.en: Look at that big fish!
examples.zh: 看那條大魚！

examples.en: The rabbit hops across the grass.
examples.zh: 兔子跳過草地。

examples.en: My rabbit loves eating carrots.
examples.zh: 我的兔子愛吃紅蘿蔔。

examples.en: She rides a horse every weekend.
examples.zh: 她每個週末都騎馬。

examples.en: The horse runs very fast.
examples.zh: 那匹馬跑得很快。

examples.en: The cow gives us fresh milk.
examples.zh: 牛提供我們新鮮牛奶。

examples.en: Cows are eating grass on the farm.
examples.zh: 牛在農場上吃草。

examples.en: The pig is rolling in the mud.
examples.zh: 豬在泥巴裡打滾。

examples.en: Pigs are actually very smart animals.
examples.zh: 豬其實是很聰明的動物。

examples.en: The ducks are swimming in the pond.
examples.zh: 鴨子在池塘裡游泳。

examples.en: A baby duck followed its mother.
examples.zh: 一隻小鴨跟著牠的媽媽。

examples.en: The chicken laid an egg this morning.
examples.zh: 那隻雞今天早上下了一顆蛋。

examples.en: We raise chickens in our backyard.
examples.zh: 我們在後院養雞。

examples.en: The sheep have thick white wool.
examples.zh: 綿羊有厚厚的白色羊毛。

examples.en: A flock of sheep crossed the road.
examples.zh: 一群綿羊穿過馬路。

examples.en: A little mouse ran under the table.
examples.zh: 一隻小老鼠跑到桌子底下。

examples.en: The cat is chasing a mouse.
examples.zh: 貓正在追一隻老鼠。

examples.en: The puppy is chewing on my shoe.
examples.zh: 小狗在咬我的鞋子。

examples.en: We just got a new puppy!
examples.zh: 我們剛養了一隻新的小狗！

examples.en: The kitten is playing with a ball of yarn.
examples.zh: 小貓在玩一團毛線。

examples.en: That kitten is only two weeks old.
examples.zh: 那隻小貓才兩週大。

examples.en: Do you have any pets?
examples.zh: 你有養寵物嗎？

examples.en: A pet needs love and care.
examples.zh: 寵物需要愛與照顧。

examples.en: The dog wags its tail when it's happy.
examples.zh: 狗開心時會搖尾巴。

examples.en: A cat's tail helps it keep balance.
examples.zh: 貓的尾巴幫助牠保持平衡。

examples.en: Don't forget to feed the cat.
examples.zh: 別忘了餵貓。

examples.en: I feed my fish twice a day.
examples.zh: 我一天餵魚兩次。

examples.en: The dog barks at strangers.
examples.zh: 這隻狗會對陌生人吠叫。

examples.en: Why does your dog bark so much?
examples.zh: 你的狗為什麼叫得這麼兇？

examples.en: The cat meows when it's hungry.
examples.zh: 貓餓的時候會喵喵叫。

examples.en: My cat meows at the door every morning.
examples.zh: 我的貓每天早上在門口喵喵叫。

examples.en: Always keep your dog on a leash in the park.
examples.zh: 在公園裡一定要用牽繩牽好你的狗。

examples.en: He grabbed the leash and took the dog out.
examples.zh: 他抓起牽繩帶狗出門。

examples.en: The cat's collar has a small bell.
examples.zh: 貓的項圈上有個小鈴鐺。

examples.en: Put the name tag on the collar.
examples.zh: 把名牌掛在項圈上。

examples.en: The hamster sleeps in its cage.
examples.zh: 倉鼠睡在牠的籠子裡。

examples.en: Please clean the bird's cage today.
examples.zh: 今天請清理鳥籠。

examples.en: I took my dog to the vet yesterday.
examples.zh: 我昨天帶我的狗去看獸醫。

examples.en: The vet said the cat is healthy.
examples.zh: 獸醫說這隻貓很健康。

examples.en: Cats groom themselves every day.
examples.zh: 貓每天都會梳理自己的毛。

examples.en: We groom our dog once a month.
examples.zh: 我們一個月幫狗梳理一次毛。

examples.en: The hamster runs on its wheel at night.
examples.zh: 倉鼠晚上在滾輪上跑步。

examples.en: My hamster stores food in its cheeks.
examples.zh: 我的倉鼠把食物藏在頰囊裡。

examples.en: The turtle moves very slowly.
examples.zh: 烏龜移動得很慢。

examples.en: My pet turtle likes to bask in the sun.
examples.zh: 我的寵物龜喜歡曬太陽。

examples.en: The parrot can say a few words.
examples.zh: 這隻鸚鵡會說幾個字。

examples.en: Her parrot has bright green feathers.
examples.zh: 她的鸚鵡有鮮豔的綠色羽毛。

examples.en: The dog gave me its paw.
examples.zh: 狗把腳掌伸給我。

examples.en: The kitten hurt its paw.
examples.zh: 小貓的腳掌受傷了。

examples.en: The cat has soft, shiny fur.
examples.zh: 這隻貓有柔軟又亮麗的毛皮。

examples.en: Dogs shed their fur in summer.
examples.zh: 狗在夏天會掉毛。

examples.en: The bird spread its wings and flew away.
examples.zh: 鳥張開翅膀飛走了。

examples.en: A butterfly has beautiful wings.
examples.zh: 蝴蝶有美麗的翅膀。

examples.en: I found a bird feather on the ground.
examples.zh: 我在地上撿到一根鳥羽毛。

examples.en: The peacock has colorful feathers.
examples.zh: 孔雀有色彩繽紛的羽毛。

examples.en: The cat likes to scratch the sofa.
examples.zh: 貓喜歡抓沙發。

examples.en: My dog scratches its ear a lot.
examples.zh: 我的狗常常抓耳朵。

examples.en: The puppy wags its tail happily.
examples.zh: 小狗開心地搖著尾巴。

examples.en: Dogs wag their tails to greet you.
examples.zh: 狗會搖尾巴來跟你打招呼。

examples.en: The cat purrs when I pet it.
examples.zh: 我摸貓時牠會發出呼嚕聲。

examples.en: A purring cat sounds so relaxing.
examples.zh: 呼嚕的貓聽起來好放鬆。

examples.en: I need to change the cat's litter box.
examples.zh: 我得換貓砂盆了。

examples.en: The dog had a litter of six puppies.
examples.zh: 這隻狗生了一窩六隻小狗。

examples.en: We decided to adopt a dog from the shelter.
examples.zh: 我們決定從收容所領養一隻狗。

examples.en: You can adopt a cat instead of buying one.
examples.zh: 你可以領養貓，而不是用買的。

examples.en: Her dog is very obedient and well-trained.
examples.zh: 她的狗很聽話又受過良好訓練。

examples.en: An obedient pet follows commands easily.
examples.zh: 聽話的寵物容易服從指令。

examples.en: Dogs are known for being loyal.
examples.zh: 狗以忠誠聞名。

examples.en: A loyal pet stays by your side.
examples.zh: 忠誠的寵物會待在你身邊。

examples.en: The dog becomes aggressive when it feels scared.
examples.zh: 這隻狗感到害怕時會變得有攻擊性。

examples.en: Never touch an aggressive animal.
examples.zh: 千萬別去碰有攻擊性的動物。

examples.en: Hunting is a natural instinct for cats.
examples.zh: 狩獵是貓的天生本能。

examples.en: Animals rely on instinct to survive.
examples.zh: 動物靠本能生存。

examples.en: Dogs were domesticated thousands of years ago.
examples.zh: 狗在數千年前就被馴養了。

examples.en: A domesticated animal lives close to humans.
examples.zh: 馴養的動物與人類生活得很近。

examples.en: Hamsters are nocturnal, so they are active at night.
examples.zh: 倉鼠是夜行性的，所以在晚上很活躍。

examples.en: Owls are nocturnal hunters.
examples.zh: 貓頭鷹是夜行性的獵手。

examples.en: You should vaccinate your puppy early.
examples.zh: 你應該及早幫小狗接種疫苗。

examples.en: The vet will vaccinate the cat next week.
examples.zh: 獸醫下週會幫貓打疫苗。

examples.en: What breed is your dog?
examples.zh: 你的狗是什麼品種？

examples.en: This breed is gentle and good with kids.
examples.zh: 這個品種很溫和，跟小孩相處融洽。

examples.en: The animal shelter is full of stray dogs.
examples.zh: 動物收容所裡滿是流浪狗。

examples.en: Volunteers help care for pets at the shelter.
examples.zh: 志工在收容所幫忙照顧寵物。

examples.en: A stray cat has been living near our house.
examples.zh: 有隻流浪貓一直住在我們家附近。

examples.en: She feeds the stray dogs every evening.
examples.zh: 她每天傍晚都餵那些流浪狗。

examples.en: A dog can be a wonderful companion.
examples.zh: 狗可以是很棒的同伴。

examples.en: For many elderly people, a pet is their closest companion.
examples.zh: 對許多長者來說，寵物是他們最親近的夥伴。

examples.en: Bears hibernate through the cold winter.
examples.zh: 熊在寒冷的冬天會冬眠。

examples.en: Some turtles hibernate when it gets cold.
examples.zh: 有些烏龜天氣變冷時會冬眠。

examples.en: The rabbit is very tame and gentle.
examples.zh: 這隻兔子很溫馴又溫和。

examples.en: It took months to make the parrot tame.
examples.zh: 花了好幾個月才讓這隻鸚鵡變得溫馴。
